articles.title: Bruins host Blackstone Valley co-op hockey team at practice after run to R.I. state title ​
articles.description:
“It's a family, and whenever we get an opportunity like this, we really cherish it."

The post Bruins host Blackstone Valley co-op hockey team at practice after run to R.I. state title ​ appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Bruins hosted Blackstone Valley co-op hockey team for practice on March 23, 2023.
Team recently won the Rhode Island state title, celebrating their achievement.
Local youth hockey players gained inspiration and exposure from practicing with NHL players.

articles.title: Patriots sign offensive tackle James Hudson
articles.description:
Hudson has played in 60 career games including 19 starts, 14 of which came at right tackle.

The post Patriots sign offensive tackle James Hudson appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Patriots signed offensive tackle James Hudson on March 23, 2026.
Hudson has 60 career games, including 19 starts at right tackle.
This addition aims to strengthen the Patriots' offensive line for upcoming games.

articles.title: As waiting game continues with James Hagens, Bruins coach has no issue adding prospects to lineup
articles.description:
"It’s almost like it’s part of the game now.”

The post As waiting game continues with James Hagens, Bruins coach has no issue adding prospects to lineup appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Bruins coach Marco Sturm supports integrating prospects like James Hagens into the lineup.
Hagens, a promising talent, is currently awaiting a decision on his NHL status.
Boston residents can expect increased local talent in Bruins games this season.
